summary:
Artisanal Restoration specializes in the renovation and restoration of historic homes, restoration of antique furniture, and in custom-built furniture and cabinetry.

In any given job, we integrate our full palette of skills and services into a cohesive whole matching your particular home and preferences.

We serve the greater Nashville and Middle Tennessee areas.
additionalServicesText:
Additional services offered by Artisanal Restoration include:

* Bespoke home additions
* Custom trim and finish carpentry
* Construction and restoration of decks and porches
* Stair construction and restoration
* Service of windows and doors
* Interior and exterior rot restoration
* Regular service and maintenance of historic homes

In any given job, we can combine and integrate all of these services into a cohesive whole matching your home and preferences.
servicesImageAlt: Hallway and kitchen of a 1910 home in Princeton, NJ, fully restored with custom trim after flood damage

servicesList.serviceHeading: Restoration and renovation of historic homes
servicesList.serviceDescription: Artisanal Restoration specializes in the service and restoration of historic homes, handling everything from routine maintenance to full-scale renovations. We recognize and adapt to each home's quirks and history on a case-by-case basis, and our work will always be faithful to the time period and unique character of your home.
servicesList.serviceImageAlt: A 1910 home in Princeton, NJ served by Artisanal Restoration

servicesList.serviceDescription: We refresh worn finishes, restore scratched and chipped surfaces, and repair structural damage in antique furniture and cabinetry. Master carpenter Randall Basti of Artisanal Restoration has both the eye for detail to recongnize and preserve the unique personality of the original piece, and the technical skill to handle the complex joinery and intricate ornamentation usually involved in the restoration.
servicesList.serviceImageAlt: An antique table being restored in the Artisanal Restoration workshop

servicesList.serviceDescription: We build custom furniture and cabinetry to almost any size and specification and will work with you through the design process from start to finish to ensure the piece exactly fits, both functionally and aesthetically, the special role it will fulfill in your home.
servicesList.serviceImageAlt: A custom table built to match the art and wall color in a parlor

servicesList.serviceDescription: We offer both restoration and new construction of decks and porches. We can repair rot damage, structural issues, and worn finishes, replace rotted structural framing, install decking surface, and build fences, rails, and stairs. Both repairs and new construction are made to last, using rot-resistant decking material and finishes, corrosion-resistant hardware, and structural framing designed to minimize damage from ground and water contact.
servicesList.serviceImageAlt: A second-story view of a deck restored by Artisanal Restoration

servicesList.serviceDescription:
Additional services offered by Artisanal Restoration include:

* Bespoke home additions
* Custom trim and finish carpentry

servicesList.serviceImageAlt: A detail image of the finish carpentry on a fineal custom-built for a staircase in a Princeton, NJ home

workingWithUsBody:
In practice, working with Artisanal Restoration looks something like this:

* You contact us by contact form, phone, or email from [our Contact page](/contact). Randall, the owner of Artisanal Restoration, will respond to discuss your project, answer questions, and schedule an on-site consultation at your home; you will then discuss a plan of work, project schedule, and budget.
* Randall performs the work himself at your home, bringing the necessary tools and materials with him in his pickup truck and packing up at the end of the day. He comes with his trusty vacuum and cleans up throughout the work day—many clients report returning to such clean homes that they hardly believe they had construction work performed earlier that day.
* Randall will be communicative and accessible throughout the project, offering suggestions on design, how to do the work faithfully to the character and time period of your home, how to make repairs that will last permanently, and ways to simplify work and reduce costs without sacrificing quality; and he is always ready to explain both the functional and design reasons for any choice he makes.
* Clients consistenly praise Randall's attention to detail, quality of workmanship, and aversion to cutting corners, together with his excellent communication and readiness to explain every step of the design and work process along the way. We hope you will feel the same way!
*
